---
title: "Essay" 
#description: |
#  <br>一个人的阅读史是他的思想史
listing: 
  contents:
    - "**/index.qmd"
    - "**/index.markdown"
    - "**/index.md"
  type: grid
  fields: [title, categories, date, image]
  sort: "date desc"
  filter-ui: false
  image-align: left
  image-height: 100%
format: 
  html: 
    page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false

comments: false
---
